issues.message: children prop marked as required:false in data but is non-optional (no ?) in source interface CustomBlockProps: children: React.ReactNode

Description says 'wrapping the Gravity UI SegmentedRadioGroup' but size type in data is "'s' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl'" which may not match SegmentedRadioGroupProps size. The actual size options depend on the uikit SegmentedRadioGroup component

onClose prop type in data is '(form: FormApi<FormValues, InitialFormValues>) => void' but source signature is 'onClose?: (form: FormApi<FormValues, InitialFormValues>) => void' with default '() => {}'. The source also receives a second argument: the ModalCloseReason event from the uikit Dialog onClose callback, which is not reflected in the data type

Props list is minimal (value, onChange, children) but actual interface extends Omit<CheckboxProps, 'value' | 'view' | 'checked' | 'onUpdate' | 'onChange'>, inheriting many additional props from Gravity UI Checkbox (size, disabled, indeterminate, etc.)

Props list is minimal (value, onChange, error) but actual type is ControlProps<string> & Omit<TextInputProps, keyof ControlProps<string>>, inheriting many additional props from Gravity UI TextInput (size, disabled, placeholder, hasClear, etc.)

Props list is minimal (value, onChange, error) but actual type extends Omit<TextArea props, 'value' | 'ref' | 'onUpdate' | 'onChange' | 'error'>, inheriting many additional props from Gravity UI TextArea (rows, minRows, maxRows, disabled, placeholder, etc.)

Props list is minimal (value, onChange) but actual type is Omit<SelectProps, 'onUpdate' | 'onChange'> & {onChange}, inheriting many additional props from Gravity UI Select (options, multiple, filterable, placeholder, disabled, etc.)

Props list is minimal (value, onChange, labelLeft, labelRight, size) but actual type extends Omit<Switch props, 'value' | 'checked' | 'onUpdate' | 'onChange'>, inheriting additional props from Gravity UI Switch (disabled, etc.)
Props list is minimal but actual type extends Partial<Omit<TextInputProps, ...>>, inheriting additional optional props from Gravity UI TextInput (placeholder, size, etc.)
Props list is minimal but actual interface extends Omit<SegmentedRadioGroupProps, 'onChange' | 'value'>, inheriting additional props from Gravity UI SegmentedRadioGroup (disabled, width, etc.)
Hook filename in vendor source is misspelled as 'useStableEventHendler.ts' (Hendler vs Handler). Data correctly names it useStableEventHandler but consumers should be aware of the source typo

Data lists empty props array. DeprecatedDialog is an alias for the internal Dialog class which accepts the same DFDialogProps interface. Listing at least a reference to DFDialogProps would be more informative
